description: city in Maryland, United States
description_wiki: Baltimore ( BAWL-tim-or, locally:  BAWL-dim-OR or  BAWL-mər), also known as Baltimore City, is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Maryland.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Maryland (US:  ) is a state in the Mid-Atlantic and Southeastern regions of the United States.

description: private university in Baltimore, Maryland, USA
description_wiki: Johns Hopkins University (often abbreviated as Johns Hopkins, Hopkins, or JHU) is a private research university in Baltimore, Maryland, United States.

description: American worldwide food company formed by the merger of Kraft Foods and Heinz
description_wiki: The Kraft Heinz Company (KHC), commonly known as Kraft Heinz (), is an American multinational food company formed by the merger of Kraft Foods Group, Inc.

entity: Walter Reed National Military Medical Center
description: tri-service U.S. military medical center in Bethesda, Maryland
description_wiki: Walter Reed National Military Medical Center (WRNMMC; formerly known as the National Naval Medical Center and colloquially referred to as Bethesda Naval Hospital, Walter Reed, or Navy Med) is a United States military medical center located in Bethesda, Maryland.

description: 1941 Japanese surprise attack on the U.S
description_wiki: On December 7, 1941, the Empire of Japan launched a surprise military strike on the United States Pacific Fleet at its naval base at Pearl Harbor on Oahu, Hawaii.

description: maritime branch of the United States military
description_wiki: The United States Navy (USN) is the maritime service branch of the United States Armed Forces and is designated as the navy of the United States in the Constitution.

surface_forms: Air Corps in a short time
Air Force--I took more training in the Air Corps
description: aerial warfare branch of the United States Army from 1941 to 1947
description_wiki: The United States Army Air Forces (USAAF or AAF) was the major land-based aerial warfare service component of the United States Army and de facto aerial warfare service branch of the United States during and immediately after World War II (1941–1947).

aliases: Camp Meade Cantonment and Field Signal School
description: United States Army installation
city in Florida, United States
description_wiki: Tampa (  TAM-pə) is a major city on the Gulf Coast of the U.S. state of Florida and the county seat of Hillsborough County.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki:
Florida (  FLORR-ih-də; Spanish: [floˈɾiða] ) is a state in the Southeastern and South Atlantic
regions of the United States.

description: 1939-1946 United States Army Air Forces base at Tampa International Airport, Florida, USA
U.S. Army facility located adjacent to Aberdeen, Maryland
description_wiki: Aberdeen Proving Ground (APG) is a U.S. Army facility located adjacent to Aberdeen, Maryland, United States.

description: island in the Mediterranean, region of Italy
description_wiki: Sicily (Italian and Sicilian: Sicilia), officially the Sicilian Region, is an island in the central Mediterranean Sea and one of the twenty regions of Italy, situated south of the Italian Peninsula in continental Europe.

aliases: Virginia Beach–Norfolk–Newport News, VA–NC, Metropolitan Statistical Area
description: body of water and metropolitan area in the United States
description_wiki: Hampton Roads is a body of water in the United States that serves as a wide channel for the James, Nansemond, and Elizabeth rivers between Old Point Comfort and Sewell's Point near the point at which Chesapeake Bay flows into the Atlantic Ocean.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Virginia, officially the Commonwealth of Virginia, is a state in the Southeastern and Mid-Atlantic regions of the United States between the Atlantic Coast and the Appalachian Mountains.

description: cargo ships built in the United States during World War II
description_wiki: Liberty ships are a class of cargo ship built in the United States during World War II under the Emergency Shipbuilding Program.

description: YouTube video from The Great War channel
coastal city in Oran Province, Algeria
description_wiki: Oran (Arabic: وَهران, romanized: Wahrān) is a major coastal city located in the northwest of Algeria.

description: northernmost region of the African continent
description_wiki: North Africa, also known as Northern Africa, is a region encompassing the northern portion of the African continent.

description: country in South Asia
description_wiki: India, officially the Republic of India, is a country in South Asia.

description: artificial sea-level waterway in Egypt
description_wiki: The Suez Canal (; Egyptian Arabic: قناة السويس, Qanāt as-Suwais) is an artificial sea-level waterway in Egypt, connecting the Mediterranean Sea to the Red Sea through the Isthmus of Suez and dividing Africa and Asia (and by extension, the Sinai Peninsula from the rest of Egypt).

description: seawater inlet of the Indian Ocean
description_wiki: The Red Sea is a sea inlet of the Indian Ocean, lying between Africa and Asia.

description: capital city in Maharashtra, India
description_wiki: Mumbai ( muum-BY; Marathi: Mumbaī, pronounced [ˈmumbəi] ), also known as Bombay ( bom-BAY; its official name until 1995), is the capital city of the Indian state of Maharashtra.

description: capital city of West Bengal, India
description_wiki: Kolkata, also known as Calcutta (its official name until 2001), is the capital and largest city of the Indian state of West Bengal.

description: road in Myanmar
description_wiki: The Burma Road (Chinese: 滇缅公路) was a road linking Burma (now known as Myanmar) with southwest China.

aliases: Republic of the Union of Myanmar
description: country in Southeast Asia
description_wiki: Myanmar, officially the Republic of the Union of Myanmar and also referred to as Burma (the official English name until 1989), is a country in northwest Southeast Asia.

description: capital of Yunnan province, China
description_wiki: Kunming is the capital and largest city of the province of Yunnan in China.

surface_forms: Chengtu which was north a little bit in the center of the city
description: capital of Sichuan Province, China
description_wiki: Chengdu is the capital city of the Chinese province of Sichuan.

description: mountain range in Asia
description_wiki: The Himalayas, or Himalaya, is a mountain range in Asia separating the plains of the Indian subcontinent from the Tibetan Plateau.

description: Japanese fighter aircraft
description_wiki: The Mitsubishi A6M "Zero" is a long-range carrier-capable fighter aircraft that was manufactured by Mitsubishi Aircraft Company, which was part of Mitsubishi Heavy Industries.

description: 1939 fighter aircraft family
description_wiki: The Lockheed P-38 Lightning is an American single-seat, twin-engined fighter aircraft that was used during World War II. Developed for the United States Army Air Corps (USAAC) by the Lockheed Corporation, the P-38 incorporated a distinctive twin boom design with a central nacelle containing the cockpit and armament.

description: president of the United States from 1933 to 1945 (1882–1945)
description_wiki: Franklin Delano Roosevelt (January 30, 1882 – April 12, 1945), also known as FDR, was the 32nd president of the United States, serving from 1933 until his death in 1945.

aliases: An Act to Promote the Defense of the United States
An Act further to promote the defense of the United States, and for other purposes.
description: United States foreign policy during World War II
